lines.text: How did I come up with Peaks of Prestige? Haha... I owe it all to a dear friend and rival of mine.
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: I'll keep his name a secret, but back in school, I had this very serious friend, a real perfectionist.
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: I actually got the inspiration for Peaks of Prestige during a tactical simulation practice with him.
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: He kept launching these fierce Echo attacks against my defenses. I was exhausted just trying to hold the line. But looking back now... that can be quite fun, agreed?
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: Haha... That was just one of many moments between us. He was always so driven. How could I afford to fall behind?
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: In fact, without the pressure he put on me, the constant criticism and praise, I probably would've started slacking off a long time ago. He always did call me out for being so nonchalant, hehe...
lines.quest_name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel

lines.text: —Legendary customer service rep who set the record for the fastest response time!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Ahem. Please, allow me to introduce myself properly. I am Furius, and I serve in the finest capacity at Peaks of Prestige's... customer service.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I had the pleasure of witnessing your duel, and even as a newcomer, your command of strategy was truly remarkable.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Honestly, it's no exaggeration. You could rival even our top players. A rising star of the game!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: You might even become the first ever Apex Duelist.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: That's precisely correct.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: But if you're willing to take on this challenge, I believe you can collect all six Medals and rise as the first Apex Duelist in the game's history.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: By then, we could use your story to hype the game, buy media, and make Peaks of Prestige the next nationwide sensation like the Agon of Champions! Then... we'd make a killing...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: N-nothing! You must have misheard me.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Ahem, the important thing is, I truly recommend you set your sights on becoming the Apex Duelist.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: And more importantly, I'll make you a promise.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The journey there will be filled with thrills and excitement!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Fantastic!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The first Lord of Prestige isn't far from here. It's the perfect place for a beginner to start climbing the ranks.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I'll be around for a while. If you want to trade in your Prestige Points for rewards, just come find me.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Well then, enjoy your journey, duelist!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I've been waiting far too long for this moment.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Come, {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}. Show me what you're made of.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: For me, for the spectators, and for Peaks of Prestige... Let's make this duel one for the ages!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The sixth Lord of Prestige, Furius the Firebrand, accepts the challenge!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: It was a brilliant duel, {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: As the developer of Peaks of Prestige, I thought I knew every twist and turn of this game... Yet you still defeated me even after I gave it everything I had.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I bet word of the first-ever Apex Duelist should be spreading like wildfire among the players.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Well...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Even though hosting the final in Colosseum Olymdos got us a lot of attention, maybe because people still don't fully understand the game... the number of new duelists isn't quite what I'd hoped for.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: (Sighs) Am I really destined to be a failed manager again...?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Hm? Wait a second.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Oh... oh my goodness!!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}, did you hear that?!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Sponsors! Sponsors are calling, saying they want to fund Peaks of Prestige!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: And not just sponsors, even the Septimont authorities reached out! They said they're considering recognizing Peaks of Prestige as an official exhibition sport!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: After watching our duel, they said they saw the potential, and they want to help bring it to all of Septimont!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Honestly, this outcome is beyond my wildest dreams.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Thank you. Truly. Thank you so much, {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Phew... maybe, just maybe, one day, the name Peaks of Prestige will echo across all of Solaris!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: From now on, let the duels continue to bring you joy. Here's to you, our first ever Apex Duelist!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
